stemHtml: Which of the following is a definition of the coefficient of drag (C<sub>D</sub>)?

options.a: A dimensionless quantity that is used to quantify the resistance of an object whilst moving through a fluid.
options.b: A dimensionless quantity that is used to quantify the resistance of an object applied by moving against a solid.
options.c: A quantity measured in Newtons (N) of force, is used to quantify the resistance of an object in a fluid environment.
options.d: A dimensionless quantity that is used to quantify the forward propulsion of an object moving through a fluid environment.
